notes:
Found a comment in the games discussion forums.  

1. get: https://community.pcgamingwiki.com/files/file/431-project-freedom-dummy-mpegdll/

2. Go to the games home folder and unzip the file from step 1 and replace mpeg.dll (or rename it)  with the this new one .

This new mpeg.dll apparently doesn't run the movies. Otherwise runs fine.  You can watch the movies in mplayer but if you don't you've lost nothing whatsoever :)

Game runs ok so far but I only tried the first three tutorial missions.

Good luck
title: Project Freedom
